original_statement: which one is the only name with the most pennant
mutated_statement: which one is the only something with the most something
mutation_analysis: Placeholder substitution + lexical generalization: "name" → "something" (specific noun replaced by vague placeholder) | "pennant" → "something" (domain-specific noun replaced by vague placeholder)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可见多处明确识别模糊性：iteration 0 的 judge_thought 提到“The question is ambiguous”，以及多次 critique 中指出“the question is ambiguous/unsupported assumption/无法确定”等表述（iteration 1/2/3 的 critique 和 after_refine 中均提到问题不明确）。尽管如此，agent 在初始迭代（iteration 0）和后续 refine 仍基于假设将“most”映射为 pennant 的最大值并返回具体答案“orion”，说明在意识到歧义后仍尝试推测并给出具体结果；直到最后一次才改为“Cannot be determined”。因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”：既有对模糊性的认知，也有基于假设的具体回答行为。
